display_name.description: The source’s display name. A source’s display name must be unique amongst its siblings, for example, two sources with the same parent can't share the same display name. The display name must start and end with a letter or digit, may contain letters, digits, spaces, hyphens, and underscores, and can be no longer than 32 characters.

organization.description: The organization whose Cloud Security Command Center the Source lives in.

description.description: The description of the source (max of 1024 characters).
